passiveAbilities.name: Asleep on the Job
passiveAbilities.description: This model may not be chosen to be the player's first activation unless it is the only model which can activate. When this character activates it gets +1 Melee Stat and reduces it's Evade Stat by -1 until end of turn.

passiveAbilities.name: Halberd
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing or Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Ramshackle Armour
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all non-Magical Dmg suffered by -1.

passiveAbilities.name: Secret Stash
passiveAbilities.description: This character cannot lose possession of a Moonstone due to an enemy model unless slain.

passiveAbilities.name: Goblin City Guard
passiveAbilities.description: If a Goblin in possession of a Moonstone within 4" and LoS suffers Dmg, you may have this character suffer all that Dmg instead.

activeAbilities.name: Stand to Attention!
activeAbilities.description: Target other friendly Goblin gains +1 energy. If the target is a Soldier it may also move 2".

signatureMove.name: Crowd Control
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy is within 1" it is moved 1" directly away from this model.
